summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Star Citizen Fleet Manager MVP - Both backend APIs and frontend UI are working excellently with professional Origin Jumpworks luxury design aesthetic

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - both codes indicate unauthorized access correctly

passed_tests: Login/Authentication with demo mode (any email/token works)
Dashboard loads with correct stats (6 ships, 4 vehicles, 6 components, 6 weapons)
Featured ships display with proper Origin luxury styling
Ships page with search functionality (filters to Origin ships correctly)
Manufacturer filter works (Origin Jumpworks filtering)
Add to fleet functionality working
Ship detail page displays specifications and upgrades correctly
Vehicles page with search (Cyclone filtering works)
Components page with search and type filtering (Shield components)
Weapons page with search and type filtering (Energy weapons)
Navigation between all pages working smoothly
Logout functionality redirects to login correctly
Mobile responsive design works perfectly
Mobile navigation menu opens/closes properly
Professional Origin Jumpworks aesthetic with cyan/blue color scheme
Glass-morphism effects and premium styling implemented correctly
All backend APIs returning mock data as expected
Fleet operations (add/get ships) working correctly
JWT authentication and authorization working
Upgrade recommendations displayed properly for ships

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI features, navigation, search, filtering, responsive design working)
